_doc: Exemptions for lint:api-caller-discipline. Each entry is one file path that legitimately composes a backend URL outside app/lib/api.ts. The lint reads `path` + `reason`; defence/finance procurement reviewers can audit this file to see *why* each bypass exists. Bare `fetch()` chunks in app pages are NOT exempt — refactor them to go through apiSite/apiV2/apiRoot.
_format: Add entries to `exemptions` only. Path is repo-relative. Reason is one sentence; longer notes belong in the file's header comment.

exemptions.reason: EventSource (SSE) URL composition — the api.ts helpers handle fetch-style RPC only; streaming connections compose their own URL. The hook itself is the chokepoint for realtime subs.
EventSource (SSE) for topology change notifications — same reason as useRealtimeSubscription.ts.
EventSource (SSE) for portfolio-model adoption progress — long-lived stream during cutover state-machine; can be refactored to a typed wrapper but the current call-site composes API_BASE locally.
